Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 
60 
CNTRCT_NUM 
LABEL: 
Medicare Part C Contract Number 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the unique identification for a managed care organization (MCO) enabling the entity to 
provide coverage to eligible Medicare beneficiaries. 
SHORT NAME: CNTRCT_NUM 
LONG NAME: CNTRCT_NUM 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
5 
SOURCE: 
Medicare Advantage Organizations (MAOs) 
FILE(S): 
IP base 
SNF base 
HH base
